title: Plantify
description:
Plantify is a third-person farming and management game which focuses on a small cat learning how to properly take care of plants. Add entries to your Journal, Fulfil Orders for your Community and Upgrade your Garden size to the max!

The Game will teach players actual ways to care for specific plants in a simplified way. It takes actual real-life care instructions into account, such as water amounts, light requirements and correct seasons. 

At the same time, they have to help and do their part in building up the community by providing food and information on plants and care instructions to the other cats in the town.

Other features include a simple Character Creator, a Community Meter which showcases your reputation within the Cat community and a Storyline explaining the past and how the cat community will move on and work towards a better future.

NOTE:
This is a student project from the UAS St.Pölten, Austria. Expect things to not be on a AAA standard.
description_short: Plantify is a third-person farming game which focuses on a small cat learning how to properly take care of plants.
